# Neev Thakkar - Full Portfolio Context

Canonical website: https://neevthakkar.in/

## Profile Summary

Neev Thakkar is a business student and aspiring entrepreneur based in Mumbai, India. He is a dual-degree candidate at NM College and IIM Bangalore, a Bishopite, and a Zonal Representative.

## Education

- BBA - Digital Business & Entrepreneurship at Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIMB), 2025-present.
- B.Com - Management & Finance (BMF) at Narsee Monjee College of Commerce & Economics, Mumbai University, 2025-present.
- Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC), Commerce Stream, Mithibai College, Mumbai, 2023-2025; Class 12 score: 82.33%.
- Secondary School, 5th-10th Grade, The Bishop's Co-Ed School, Kalyani Nagar, Pune, 2017-2023; Class 10 score: 93%.

- Photography
- Travelling
- Cooking

## Opportunity Fit

Preferred career lane: strategy and operations, founder's office, product and growth, AI/business execution, business operations, and startup execution.

Role-fit evidence:
- SignalStack maps to product, strategy, market research, AI operations, and fintech-oriented roles.
- SRA-style website and OTP/business workflows map to business operations, growth operations, revenue operations, and founder's office roles.
- The personal portfolio maps to product literacy, execution quality, web development literacy, and AI-assisted building.
- Study tracker and productivity systems map to product thinking and operations.
- IIMB DBE app ideas map to product, growth, user research, and community roles.
- NSE NCCMP Trading - In Progress maps to fintech, market research, capital markets, and business analyst roles.
- Odin Project and LLM/AI learning map to AI operations, AI enablement, automation-heavy operations, and technical-literacy roles.

Role-quality filter:
- Prioritize roles with founder or senior-team exposure, measurable project ownership, product/growth/strategy/AI/operations scope, and the ability to produce a case study.
- Deprioritize roles limited to cold calling, social media posting, admin coordination, no metrics, no learning, or no serious brand/network value.

## Projects

### Veedol & JK Tyres Distribution

Family business exposure through distribution of Veedol engine oil and SJR Tyres, with authorised dealership experience around JK Tyres. The site describes exposure to vendor management, dealer networks, pricing strategy, and commercial operations.

### NSE NCCMP Trading Course - In Progress

Finance learning project in progress through the NSE NCCMP certification programme, focused on capital markets, equity trading, derivatives, and financial instruments.

### Personal Resume Website

Designed and built a personal portfolio using semantic HTML5 and CSS3, including custom properties, CSS Grid, Flexbox, responsive breakpoints, a glassmorphism navbar, typewriter animation, and a scrolling ticker. Built as part of a college web development module. [Vibe Coding]

## Experience And Achievements

- Zonal Representative for the IIM Bangalore BBA DBE cohort, serving as a contact point between IIM Bangalore and students in his zone.
- Dual-degree student managing concurrent academic programmes at NM College and IIM Bangalore.
- NSS Volunteer at NM College, with initiatives including Mumbai Climate Week, BMC Election Awareness Drive, Mithi River Conservation Awareness, and Carter Road Beach Clean-Up.
- School Prefect and Best Boarder at The Bishop's Co-Ed School, Kalyani Nagar, Pune.
